raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 239 establishes a task force to support and strengthen post-wildfire housing recovery efforts through coordination and streamlining funding between various organizations.",
    "AB 493 ensures that homeowners receive the interest earned on post-loss escrowed insurance funds.",
    "AB 597 prevents unfair fees and price gouging by public adjusters after major disasters.",
    "AB 797 helps stabilize property values in disaster-hit areas by funding community projects that manage residential land.",
    "AB 1032 recognizes the mental health impacts of wildfires and requires health plans to cover an additional 12 behavioral health visits annually for those impacted.",
    "AB 1161 extends the time beneficiaries have to update paperwork during state-declared emergencies."
  ]
}
```
